# Test for the new analysis tools

# Create test data
mkdir -p testdata
exec sh -c 'echo "exec echo test" > testdata/simple.txt'
exec sh -c 'echo "mcpdiff file1 file2" >> testdata/simple.txt'
exec sh -c 'echo "mcp-server-start demo go run server.go" >> testdata/simple.txt'

# Test testgraph - digraph integration
exec testgraph testdata/simple.txt
stdout 'simple.txt echo'
stdout 'simple.txt mcpdiff'
stdout 'simple.txt demo'

# Test cmd-docs - command documentation generator
exec cmd-docs -source . -cmd mcp-server-start
stdout 'mcp-server-start'
stdout 'Description:'
stdout 'Usage:'
stdout 'Suggestions:'

# Generate structured edits
exec cmd-docs -source . -format edits -structured > edits.json
exec cat edits.json
stdout '"file":'
stdout '"new_text":'

# Test apply-edits in dry-run mode
exec apply-edits -edits edits.json -dry-run
stdout 'DRY RUN'
stdout 'Summary:'

# Test coverage-hotspots (would need real coverage data)
# exec coverage-hotspots -coverage /tmp/coverage -top 5
# stdout 'Coverage Hotspots'

echo "Analysis tools working correctly"
